---
name: Connector bug
about: Report a bug in how OpenSessionLog ingests sessions from a specific tool
title: '[connector] '
labels: bug, connector
assignees: ''
---

## Tool

Which tool's sessions are affected?

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Codex CLI
- [ ] GitHub Copilot
- [ ] OpenCode
- [ ] Other: __________

## Tool version

What version of the tool are you running? (e.g., Claude Code v2.1.88)

## Operating system

macOS / Linux / Windows — which version?

## Expected behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead? Include any error messages from `osl`.

## Sample session

If possible, attach a sanitized snippet of the session file that triggers the bug. Remove any secrets, tokens, or private code first.

## `osl` version

Run `osl --version` and paste the output.
